Thanks for contributing to skiff! Please fill in the checklist below.

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change and the motivation. -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit and/or integration as appropriate)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`, or in-code comments) where relevant
- [ ] Commit messages use conventional commit prefixes (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …)
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO is enforced
- [ ] Local `nix develop -c go test ./...` passes
- [ ] If pipeline behavior changed: `bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh` passes locally (or N/A)

## How to verify

<!-- Steps a reviewer can take to confirm the change works. -->
